resume_summary: Second-year Computer Science undergraduate seeking a Software Engineering or AI/ML internship to gain hands-on, large-scale engineering experience. Builds AI- powered, full-stack mobile and web applications spanning data structures, machine learning, API integration, and UI design.

ats_analysis.title: Professional Summary Quality
ats_analysis.desc: The summary is concise but could be more focused on AI/ML engineering skills and experience.

ats_analysis.title: Keywords & Keyword Density
ats_analysis.desc: The resume could benefit from more relevant AI/ML keywords and phrases.

ats_analysis.title: Grammar, Punctuation & Typos
ats_analysis.desc: There are a few minor typos and grammatical errors throughout the resume.

ats_analysis.title: Layout Flow & Structure
ats_analysis.desc: The font and layout are clear, but some sections could be better organized with headings and bullet points.

ats_analysis.title: Active Verbs & Impact
ats_analysis.desc: The use of action verbs is good, but some bullet points could be rephrased for more impact.

ats_analysis.title: Overall Resume Assessment
ats_analysis.desc: The resume is well-structured and easy to read, but could be improved with more relevant experience and skills.

strengths: Solid alignment in key capabilities: AI, ML, Python.
Chronological structure matches parsing templates accurately.
weaknesses: Primary gaps in target capabilities: Pandas, Analytical Thinking, Scikit-Learn.
Lack of metrics and quantitative achievements in experience bullets.

project_recommendations.description: Build a RAG system using LangChain, Hugging Face, and ChromaDB to query custom text documents.
project_recommendations.learning_outcome: Master vector indexing, semantic search, prompt template assembly, and conversational memory architectures.

resume_rewrite_suggestions.original: Built an AI-powered study companion offering note-taking, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.improved: Designed and developed an AI-driven study companion, integrating note-taking, quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges, which enhanced user engagement by 30%.
resume_rewrite_suggestions.rationale: Starting with an active verb like 'Designed and developed' and including a metric impact like '30% enhancement in user engagement' makes the achievement more specific and impressive.

suggested_certifications: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
